name: capcut-caption-architecture-guide
description: Architecture, documentation, module-boundary, and UI-boundary guide for CapCut Caption.
qualityGates: Every durable feature has one owning module.
Caption words remain the source of truth for generated groups.
Provider groups are ingested through the caption domain before editor state writes.
Reusable logic is parameterized or consolidated.
Presentational UI receives props and emits events.
Catalog entries are updated for public modules/components.
